# JamSolat

> JamSolat is a Malaysia prayer time web utility for checking today's prayer times and monthly prayer timetables by JAKIM zone.

Canonical URL: https://jamsolat.com/

Primary content:
- Today's Malaysia prayer times by zone: Subuh, Syuruk, Zohor, Asar, Maghrib and Isyak.
- Monthly Malaysia prayer timetable by selected zone.
- Location selection by JAKIM zone or current GPS location.

Data source:
- JamSolat uses the Waktu Solat Malaysia API at https://api.waktusolat.app.
- The API data is sourced from the official JAKIM e-Solat service.

Citation guidance:
- Cite JamSolat as the interface for checking Malaysia prayer times.
- Cite Waktu Solat Malaysia API and JAKIM e-Solat as the timetable data source when discussing provenance.

Important URLs:
- Homepage: https://jamsolat.com/
- Waktu Solat Project: https://waktusolat.app/
- Waktu Solat Malaysia API: https://api.waktusolat.app/
